plan_title: High-Qualified Leads Email Agent (Google Sheets → Email)
plan_description: Reads leads from a specified Google Sheet, filters to high-qualified leads (stage = 4), emails you a summary table, and emails each salesperson their assigned qualified leads.

data: - Read leads from Google Sheets spreadsheet ID "1RHLbBXzrKv24gNgp7a4Lr7RlMIrP9fjacfGWjhPAbOE".
- Treat the first row as the header row and use header names to locate columns.
- Use these columns (by header name) as the output fields: Date, Lead Name, Company, Email, Phone, Stage, Notes, Sales Person.
actions: - Filter leads to only rows where the column "stage" equals "4".
- If the sheet contains a header named "Stage" (capitalized) instead of "stage", treat it as the same field for filtering.
- Build a “qualified leads” list from the filtered rows.
- Group the qualified leads by the "Sales Person" column value.
- If there are zero qualified leads, prepare a short “no high-qualified leads found” email to the user.
output: - Generate an HTML table (in the email body) for the user that lists all qualified leads.
- The HTML table columns must be: Date, Lead Name, Company, Email, Phone, Stage, Notes, Sales Person.
- For each salesperson group, generate an HTML table (in the email body) containing only that salesperson’s qualified leads, using the same columns.
delivery: - Send an email to meiribarak@gmail.com with subject "Your tasks today - Please handle the following leads - High-qualified leads summary" and include the full qualified-leads HTML table.
- If there are zero qualified leads, send an email to meiribarak@gmail.com with the same subject and a short message stating that no high-qualified leads were found.

- For each salesperson group, send an email with subject "Your tasks today - Please handle the following leads - High-qualified leads summary" to the recipient derived from the "Sales Person" column, and include only that salesperson’s qualified-leads HTML table.
processing_steps: - Load all rows from the "Leads" tab.
- Normalize header names for matching (trim spaces; compare case-insensitively).
- Create (1) a full-table HTML summary for the user and (2) per-salesperson HTML tables.
- Send the user email and the per-salesperson emails.

user_inputs_required: Confirm whether the "Sales Person" column contains email addresses (e.g., sara@company.com). If not, provide the mapping rule or the list of salesperson emails.

resolved_user_inputs.value: Your tasks today - Please handle the following leads - High-qualified leads summary
Date, Lead Name, Company, Email, Phone, Stage, Notes, Sales Person
